roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING FOR PLEA OPEN/X:THE SENTENCES IN COUNTS ONE & TWO ARE THESAME & CONCURRENT:/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 1 D:PJ 20 D/CTS:20/4019HALF/VF4:300/VF2:150/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER: ANY RESTITUTION FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 16000448,/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT TWO TO A  MISDEMEANOR IS GRANTED, OVER THE PEOPLE'S OBJECTION/TEXT: DEFTWAIVES INST AND ARRAIGNMENT GUILTY PLEA/FAWC/IRRC/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT PLEADS OPEN TO THE COURT ON BOTH COUNTS,  OVER THE PEOPLE'S OBJECTION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 & 2//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/CTORD:THAT BOTH COURT & COUNSEL WAIVE THE DEFENDANT'S RIGHT TO A PRE-SENTENCE REPORT/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:PETER FITZPATRICK/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 10-26-16/987,2/BAIL:40,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
